title: I'm running a vmware workstation - I want to kn...

messages.content: I'm running a vmware workstation - I want to know when removable USB devices are added/removed/failed
Your PowerShell script, named "MonitorUSBDevices.ps1," has been successfully saved in the Automation Vault. Is there anything else you need assistance with?
I want you to run that pro-actively - always tell me where a USB device is added/removed
The script you requested was executed successfully, and there was no additional output generated.
